operations.value: A proposed sleep-related mechanism is enhanced heat dissipation and the normal pre-sleep decline in core body temperature, but this mechanism is supported more strongly by physiological and preclinical work than by definitive human mediation studies.
operations.notes: Mechanistic claim is explicitly labeled proposed and distinguishes preclinical support from demonstrated clinical mediation.

sources.title: The Effects of Glycine on Subjective Daytime Performance in Partially Sleep-Restricted Healthy Volunteers

notes: Adds a qualified thermoregulation mechanism rather than a causal certainty.
